title: Senior Software Engineer - Amazon India Advisory Limited - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Amazon India Advisory Limited - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Amazon India Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Agra office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amazon India Advisory Limited:
Amazon India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India Advisory Limited!
